title: The Importance of Kurukshetra Dhama by Govind Krsna Das with aerial drone footage.
speaker: Yatri

spot where the Supreme Personality of Godhead showed His Virar Roop. We are coming live
from the exact place where Shri Mahabharata showed His Virar Roop.

The Matsya Purana speak about unlimited glories of Kurukshetra Dham.
Gangastu Jale Mukti Varanasi Jale Stale.
Kurukshetra Tirtham Mukti Antariksh Jale Stale.
They say Gangastu Jale Mukti.
There is salivation in the water of the Ganges.
Until unless you don't take a dip in the water of the Ganges,
Ganga will not give you salivation.
Gangastu Jale Mukti.
If you go to Banaras, Varanasi Jale Stale,
there is salivation, Mukti in the water
and as well as in the Bhoomi.
Kurukshetra Tirtham Mukti.
But Kurukshetra Dham is such a glorious Dham
that it has salivation, it has Mukti in its water,
in its Bhoomi as well as in the air.
As soon as you come in touch with the air
that is flowing in Kurukshetra, you get Mukti.
That is why sometimes people ask questions.
Why did Lord Krishna select only Kurukshetra
to have this?
Why did Lord Krishna select only Kurukshetra
to have this battlefield fought?
Have this battle fought?
Because Krishna was thinking there are 64 crore Yodas
which are to be killed.
Who are going to be?
Who is going to give them salivation or Mukti?
So we have to find such a place,
such a glorious place.
By coming in contact, a person gets salivation.
So that is why this Bhoomi is called Dharmashetra Kurukshetra.
A place where just by coming,
you get the results of Dharma.
Hare Krishna!
Hare Krishna!
Hare Krishna!
Hare Krishna!
Hare Krishna!
Hare Krishna!
